title: 7 Best ActiveCampaign Alternatives in 2025 (Free & Paid)
meta_description: Find the best ActiveCampaign alternatives. Compare email marketing, automation, and CRM tools with pricing, features, and ratings.
intro: While ActiveCampaign excels at combining email marketing with advanced automation and CRM capabilities, it may not be the right fit for every business—whether due to pricing, specific feature needs, or learning curve. We've compiled the top alternatives that offer similar or superior functionality across different use cases and budgets.
why_switch: Find a more budget-friendly option that still delivers automation and CRM features without the premium price tag
Get specialized tools built specifically for your industry, whether you're an e-commerce brand, creator, or newsletter publisher
Access a freemium model to test features risk-free before committing to a paid plan

alternatives.name: Brevo
alternatives.best_for: Businesses needing CRM and email automation at scale
alternatives.key_difference: Brevo matches ActiveCampaign's CRM and automation capabilities while offering an exceptionally generous free tier with up to 100,000 contacts. It also includes SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat, making it a true all-in-one platform at a lower starting price of $25/month.

alternatives.name: MailerLite
alternatives.tagline: Simple email marketing for small businesses
alternatives.best_for: Small businesses and freelancers on tight budgets
alternatives.key_difference: MailerLite provides enterprise-level automation and landing pages at just $9/month, making it significantly cheaper than ActiveCampaign while maintaining 4.6 G2 and 4.5 Trustpilot ratings. Its intuitive interface requires less training than ActiveCampaign, ideal for lean teams.

alternatives.name: Klaviyo
alternatives.tagline: The platform for intelligent marketing automation
alternatives.best_for: E-commerce brands using Shopify or WooCommerce
alternatives.key_difference: Klaviyo surpasses ActiveCampaign for online retailers with native integrations, predictive analytics, and SMS capabilities specifically optimized for e-commerce workflows. Its free tier supports 500 contacts, making it accessible for growing stores.

alternatives.name: ConvertKit
alternatives.best_for: Content creators, bloggers, and online course sellers
alternatives.key_difference: ConvertKit replaces ActiveCampaign's complexity with creator-first simplicity, offering visual automations and built-in commerce features without the steep learning curve. Its free plan supports 1,000 subscribers, giving new creators room to grow before paying.

alternatives.name: Beehiiv
alternatives.tagline: The newsletter platform built for growth
alternatives.key_difference: Beehiiv goes beyond ActiveCampaign's email focus by adding newsletter monetization, ad networks, and referral programs designed for publishers. With a 4.7 G2 rating and the highest Trustpilot score at 4.4, it's purpose-built for newsletter growth.

alternatives.name: Mailchimp
alternatives.best_for: Beginners and small businesses starting with email marketing
alternatives.key_difference: Mailchimp offers a completely free tier for up to 500 contacts with automation capabilities, making it ideal for testing workflows before investing in paid tools. It's more accessible than ActiveCampaign for beginners but lacks the advanced CRM features.

alternatives.name: GetResponse
alternatives.best_for: Online course creators and webinar hosts
alternatives.key_difference: GetResponse uniquely combines email automation with built-in webinar hosting and online course capabilities that ActiveCampaign lacks. Starting at just $19/month with a free tier, it's ideal for entrepreneurs building education-based businesses.

faq.q: What is the best free alternative to ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Brevo offers the most generous free tier with up to 100,000 contacts and full CRM features, making it the closest free alternative to ActiveCampaign. If you need fewer contacts, MailerLite ($0-$9/month) and Mailchimp (free up to 500 contacts) are also strong options for starting without upfront costs.

faq.q: What is the best ActiveCampaign alternative for small business?
faq.a: MailerLite is ideal for small businesses, offering powerful automation and landing pages at just $9/month—nearly 40% cheaper than ActiveCampaign. For businesses wanting CRM alongside email, Brevo provides comparable features at $25/month with a much larger free contact limit.

faq.q: Is there a cheaper alternative to ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Yes—MailerLite starts at $9/month and Brevo at $25/month, both significantly cheaper than ActiveCampaign's $15 entry price when accounting for feature parity. Additionally, Brevo's free tier with 100,000 contacts lets you avoid paid tiers entirely if you're small enough, while MailerLite's free plan supports up to 1,000 subscribers.
